title: SnackPGx: pharmacogenetic genotyping and clinical report generation from NGS data
description: SnackPGx is a desktop application for pharmacogenetic (PGx) genotyping and clinical report generation from next-generation sequencing (NGS) annotation files. It converts per-variant annotation tables into star-allele diplotypes by minimum Jaccard distance, predicts metabolizer phenotypes, and produces ready-to-use clinical reports for individual genes and disease-area test panels. Allele definitions, functional status, diplotype-phenotype mappings, and population allele frequencies are taken from the gene-specific tables provided by ClinPGx/PharmGKB and CPIC. Runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux (Java 17 / JavaFX).

creators.name: Kim, Young-gon
creators.affiliation: Department of Laboratory Medicine and Genetics, Samsung Medical Center, Sungkyunkwan University School of Medicine
